title: STAR - R/SEEK Edge AI Robotics Internship
content:
Project: R/SEEK Edge AI Robotics Work at UMBC

Situation:
- Educational robotics project required real-time AI behavior on constrained edge hardware.
- Constraints included limited compute, latency sensitivity, and practical classroom-oriented usability.

Task:
- Build and tune edge AI functionality for autonomous behavior in embedded systems context.

Action:
- Worked on embedded computer vision and real-time inference patterns for robotics workflows.
- Adapted model and system design to hardware limits and response-time requirements.
- Integrated AI logic with control-system behavior for safe and practical operation.
- Bridged cloud-trained ML concepts with on-device deployment realities.

Result:
- Source-reported strong applied performance in edge AI internship outcomes.
- Expanded deployment capability beyond cloud-only ML into embedded and real-time systems.
